entry.title: Re: Example of Python Script usage in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Is there any way directly use XML files instead of CSV/JSON etc. (standard selections of DSP)?

entry.title: Re: SAP for Me Public Cloud License Consumption Enhanced Data Download
entry.content: Hello and thank you for the question! We are working to provide tenant drill-down data for all metrics wherever technically feasible. In SuccessFactors, the calculation for some metrics, such as those for recruiting and onboarding, is technically not manageable, thus the view is not available in SAP for Me.

entry.title: Request for information on Product support on Microsoft Windows 11 OS
entry.content:
Hello,

Please let us know if the below products are supported on Microsoft Window 11 OS 

SAP_Sybase-Power-Designer-x64_IP_ADDRESS8
SAP_DotNet-Connector-For-Dot4.0-x64_3.0.16

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Request for information on Product support on Microso...
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP PowerDesigner 16.7 supports Microsoft Windows 8 and higher, or Microsoft Windows Server 2012 and higher (64-bit), including Windows 11.
This information is also documented in KBA 2347515 - List of supported Windows operating systems
and KBA 3209080 - Support for Microsoft Windows 11 OS.

SAP .Net Connector for .Net 4.0 is no longer supported as of October 2023 and will be removed from the installation process in PD 16.7 SP09.
It can be uninstalled unless you are using the DataExtractor example and connecting to NetWeaver.
For further details, please refer to KBA 3531441 - PowerDesigner 16.7 Installation and SAP .Net Connector Version Compatibility.

Kind regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: SAP Community Call for ALM
entry.content:
The free monthly webinar provides everything you need to know about SAP's Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) offerings. Get the latest news directly from SAP's topic experts!

With the monthly SAP Community Call for ALM, you have the chance to stay updated about what's going on with SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Focused Run.

For slides and recordings click here.

Link to register is coming soon!

entry.title: LMS Story Report Access
entry.content:
Hi,

I wanted to check if it's possible to share the LMS story report with all users in the organization without granting them learning admin permissions. Could you please let me know if this can be done?

Best regards,

Siddhesh Chavan

entry.title: Cannot import a PD LM into ER/Studio using the MetaIntegration import tool
entry.content:
I'm trying to import a sample PD LDM (supplied by a client) into ER/Studio and it gives me an access violation - file could not be translated.
It's not a binary file; generating a new LDM (or saving as a new model) makes no difference. If I generate a CDM, that imports fine.
Has anyone encountered this problem with the Meta Integration bridges used by Erwin and ER/Studio? I can import other CDMs and LDMs without an issue.

entry.title: Change Management in SAP S/4HANA-Transformationen: Erkenntnisse aus meiner Masterarbeit
entry.content:
Warum Change Management im SAP S/4HANA-Kontext entscheidend ist

SAP S/4HANA-Transformationen sind weit mehr als reine IT-Projekte – sie bedeuten tiefgreifende organisatorische Veränderungen. Dennoch konzentrieren sich viele Unternehmen primär auf technologische Aspekte und unterschätzen die menschliche Dimension des Wandels. Doch gerade hier entscheidet sich der Projekterfolg: Ohne Akzeptanz und Unterstützung der Mitarbeitenden kann selbst die beste technologische Lösung scheitern.

Im Rahmen meiner Masterarbeit habe ich die Rolle des Organizational Change Management in SAP S/4HANA-Transformationen untersucht. Dazu wurden eine Umfrage unter 98 Fachkräften sowie fünf Experteninterviews durchgeführt. Die wichtigsten Erkenntnisse und praxisnahen Handlungsempfehlungen stelle ich in diesem Beitrag vor.

Kurzüberblick: Daten aus Umfrage und Experteninterviews

Die Umfrage umfasste 98 Fachkräfte, die aktiv an SAP S/4HANA-Transformationen beteiligt waren. Die Mehrheit stammte aus Deutschland (64,3 %), gefolgt von China (18,4 %) und den USA (13,3 %). Die Befragten waren überwiegend zwischen 25 und 54 Jahre alt, und mehr als die Hälfte arbeitete in Unternehmen mit über 500 Mitarbeitenden. Während 43 % keine Führungsverantwortung hatten, waren 39 % in leitenden Positionen tätig.

Ergänzend dazu wurden fünf erfahrene Change-Management-Experten befragt – zwei aus den USA und drei aus Deutschland. Sie teilten wertvolle Einblicke aus der Praxis und beschrieben die häufigsten Herausforderungen sowie Erfolgsfaktoren in Transformationsprojekten.

Wichtige Erkenntnisse aus der Analyse

1. Kommunikation ist der wichtigste Erfolgsfaktor

Kommunikation ist das Herzstück jeder erfolgreichen Transformation. Die Befragung zeigt, dass eine klare, frühzeitige und kontinuierliche Kommunikation der wichtigste Erfolgsfaktor ist. Entscheidend sind:

  • Frühzeitige Kommunikation über die Notwendigkeit und den Nutzen der Veränderung.
  • Zielgruppenorientierte Ansprache, um Unsicherheiten abzubauen.
  • Interaktive Formate wie Workshops und Q&A-Sessions, um den Dialog zu fördern.

2. Führungskräfte als Schlüsselakteure

Ein oft unterschätzter Faktor: Führungskräfte sind mehr als nur Informationsvermittler – sie sind entscheidende Treiber der Veränderung. Die Studie zeigt, dass Unternehmen erfolgreicher sind, wenn Führungskräfte aktiv:

  • die Vision der Transformation vermitteln,
  • als Vorbilder agieren und den Wandel selbst mittragen,
  • Hindernisse beseitigen und Ressourcen bereitstellen.

3. Schulung und Weiterbildung statt Überforderung

Ein häufiger Fehler: Mitarbeitende werden nicht ausreichend auf neue Prozesse vorbereitet. Change Management erfordert neben technischen Schulungen auch Trainings zu neuen Prozessen und Rollenveränderungen. Effektive Maßnahmen beinhalten:

  • Individuell zugeschnittene Schulungsprogramme für verschiedene Stakeholdergruppen.
  • Digitale Lernplattformen wie „WalkMe“ oder „SAP Enable Now“ zur Begleitung des Lernprozesses.
  • Praxistrainings, die frühzeitig Einblicke in die neue Systemlandschaft ermöglichen.

4. Klare Ziele und Visionen treiben die Transformation voran

Ein entscheidender Erfolgsfaktor ist eine starke, inspirierende Vision. Unternehmen, die klare Ziele formulieren und diese aktiv kommunizieren, schaffen es besser, ihre Mitarbeitenden zu motivieren und den Wandel nachhaltig zu gestalten. Dazu gehören:

  • Klare Roadmaps und Meilensteine, die den Fortschritt greifbar machen.
  • Regelmäßige Erfolgskontrollen, um sicherzustellen, dass die Transformation auf Kurs bleibt.
  • Einbindung der Mitarbeitenden in die Zielsetzung, um Identifikation mit der Veränderung zu fördern.

5. Die am häufigsten genannten Change-Management-Methoden

Die Analyse zeigt: Ein strukturierter Change-Management-Ansatz ist essenziell. Zwei Methoden wurden in der Befragung besonders häufig genannt:

  • SAP Activate Methodology: Eine iterative, prozessorientierte Herangehensweise, die speziell für SAP-Implementierungen entwickelt wurde.
  • ADKAR-Modell von PROSCI: Eine bewährte Methode, die den individuellen Veränderungsprozess der Mitarbeitenden in den Mittelpunkt stellt.

Wichtig ist die flexible Anpassung der Methodik an Unternehmensbedürfnisse.

6. Change Management ist ein Marathon, kein Sprint

Ein häufiger Trugschluss ist, Change Management als einmalige Maßnahme zu betrachten. Erfolgreiche Unternehmen begleiten den Wandel kontinuierlich durch:

  • Change-Readiness-Analysen, um Widerstände frühzeitig zu erkennen.
  • Regelmäßige Feedbackschleifen, um die Strategie bei Bedarf anzupassen.
  • Langfristige Maßnahmen, um die Nachhaltigkeit des Wandels zu sichern.

7. Erfolgsmomente sichtbar machen

Veränderungen sind oft herausfordernd – deshalb ist es entscheidend, auch kleine Erfolge zu feiern. Unternehmen, die Erfolge bewusst hervorheben, steigern die Motivation und das Engagement ihrer Mitarbeitenden. Besonders wirksam sind laut der Befragung:

  • Team-Events & Feiern, um Fortschritte gemeinsam zu würdigen.
  • Individuelle Anreize, die den Beitrag der Mitarbeitenden honorieren.

Von Erkenntnissen zu Maßnahmen: Wie Unternehmen Change Management erfolgreich umsetzen

Die gewonnenen Erkenntnisse zeigen, dass Change Management kein optionaler Bestandteil von SAP S/4HANA-Transformationen ist, sondern ein entscheidender Erfolgsfaktor. Unternehmen können diese Erkenntnisse gezielt in die Praxis umsetzen, indem sie:

  • Frühzeitig eine Change-Strategie definieren und mit der technischen Planung abstimmen.
  • Kommunikation nicht als einmalige Maßnahme, sondern als kontinuierlichen Prozess betrachten.
  • Führungskräfte gezielt in ihre Rolle als Change-Leader entwickeln und sie aktiv als Sponsoren einsetzen.
  • Stakeholder-Engagement intensivieren, indem sie regelmäßige Feedbackrunden mit betroffenen Mitarbeitenden und Führungskräften durchführen.
  • Agile Change-Management-Modelle nutzen, um die Strategie kontinuierlich an neue Herausforderungen anzupassen.
  • Change Agents einbinden, um den Wandel auf allen Unternehmensebenen zu fördern.
  • Schulungen praxisnah und iterativ gestalten, um Mitarbeitende schrittweise auf neue Prozesse vorzubereiten.
  • Monitoring und Erfolgsmessung verstärken, indem KPIs definiert werden, um Fortschritte und Akzeptanz der Transformation messbar zu machen.
  • Nachhaltige Unterstützung sicherstellen, indem begleitende Maßnahmen auch nach der Go-Live-Phase angeboten werden.

Diese Maßnahmen helfen nicht nur, Change Management erfolgreich zu verankern, sondern auch die langfristige Akzeptanz und Effektivität der Transformation sicherzustellen.

Fazit: Change Management als entscheidender Erfolgsfaktor

Die Ergebnisse dieser Masterarbeit zeigen eines ganz deutlich: Der Erfolg einer SAP S/4HANA-Transformation steht und fällt mit dem Change Management. Technologie allein bringt keine nachhaltige Veränderung – der Schlüssel liegt in den Menschen, die sie nutzen.

Ein durchdachter Change-Management-Ansatz, eine klare Kommunikation und eine starke Führung sind essenziell, um Mitarbeitende nicht nur durch den Wandel zu führen, sondern sie aktiv einzubinden. Denn eine Transformation ist dann erfolgreich, wenn sie nicht nur umgesetzt, sondern auch von den Menschen im Unternehmen gelebt wird.

Ich freue mich auf Ihre Gedanken und Erfahrungen zu diesem Thema! Teilen Sie gerne Ihre Perspektiven oder stellen Sie Fragen in den Kommentaren. Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam darüber diskutieren, wie Change Management in der Praxis noch effektiver gestaltet werden kann!

Liebe Grüße, Sandra

entry.title: Re: building Dynamic XML file

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/performance-trap-in-string-concatenations/ba-p/13225736

entry.title: Re: Change Management in SAP S/4HANA-Transformationen: Erkenntnisse aus meiner Masterarbeit
entry.content: herzlichen Dank Sandra fürs Teilen der Zusammenfassung Deiner Masterarbeit! Das deckt sich gut mit den Erkenntnissen unserer Community, wenn auch jede Veränderung anders ist, gibt es Muster wie die von Dir beschrieben.

entry.title: Re: How to Retrieve Aggregated Data from a CDS View Cube...
entry.content: Thank you for your answer. I have tested this and successfully called my query with DATA(lr_std_query) = NEW cl_lba_std_query( i_query_name = ‘MyQuery’. Is it possible that I call a CDS CUBE view with its result in my ABAP class as well?

entry.title: Re: SO-DR-SI upload through DTW
entry.content:
Hi @Jeerick ,

Assuming SO-DR-SI = Sales Order, Delivery and Sales Invoice, you have to do the following:

  1. Create your full Sales Order template. Here, all your business-relevant fields need to be included. Bear in mind they will be copied over to the subsequent documents. After posting the documents via DTW, you're ready for the next step.

  2. Your Delivery template will contain only a few columns, as most of the details are coming from the SO. Of course, you'll have to adjust to your needs. My example below uses an item-based document, using object 17 as its base (Sales Order). So, BaseType is the base object reference, BaseEntry is the DocEntry of the Sales Order you are copying to a Delivery, and BaseLine is the line reference, as you may copy all or just some of the lines to the target document.
    Header

    Lines



  3. Once you posted the Delivery documents, you will then reuse the Delivery template for the A/R Invoice, just changing the BaseType (from 17 to 15) and BaseEntry/BaseLine accordingly.

*** If this answer resolves your question, kindly consider marking it as accepted. This helps our community by highlighting useful solutions. Thank you! ***


BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Managing SAP PowerDesigner licences in Cloud where Host ID changes
entry.content:
Hello,

We are planning to move our SAP PowerDesigner installation from traditional On-Prem Datacentre to our Cloud hosted environment (IAAS on AWS Tenant).
We use Served licences. While looking at the instructions around re-hosting the PowerDesigner licences we have a query on how to handle the Host-Id.
In the new environment the Host-Id is dynamic and will change as we regularly refresh the instance/host- it would not be viable to rehost the licences everytime there is an update to the host.

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Managing SAP PowerDesigner licences in Cloud where Ho...
entry.content:
Hello,

Please refer to KBA 3265599 - How to set up a SySAM licence server in AWS

The set up of a SySAM licence server in AWS is in principle not different than in a non AWS environment:
 - The recommendation for the HostID of the SySAM licence server is to use the Elastic Network Interface (ENI).
 - The ENI has a fixed, immutable MAC address which can be used as the Hostid of the SySAM licence server host.
 - Besides the ENI can be detached from one host instance and attached to a standby instance in case of failure while keeping the original hostid.

Kind regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Greetings from Perú

My name is Luis. I have been a consultant for over 10 years, with experience in Financial processes in the FICO, ABAP, Webdynpro, modules and have worked on multiple Implementation, Rollouts, and Support Projects as well in MM, WM, FI, CO, SD, PP, QM: BI, PI and EWM modules

entry.title: Develop Powerful Analytical Queries using ABAP Core Data Services (CDS)
entry.content:
Analytical Queries play an important role in SAP S/4HANA analytics. Analytical Queries sit on top of cubes and generate meaningful data sets that business users can explore using their own front-end tools, such as SAP Analytics Cloud. Analytical Queries are developed using ABAP CDS in the ADT tools of Eclipse.

A new, free-of-charge Learning Journey has been provided to help you develop skills in this popular topic. The Learning Journey can be found here <coming early February, please check back frequently>.

The course files are available to all learners, along with instructions to setup your own cloud ABAP environment. This means you can practice what you have learned in your own environment and even try out your own ideas without having to setup a data model from scratch.  You will find the course files and instructions for importing into your own system, here.

entry.title: In SLT while generating Objects getting some error like Field is unknown
entry.content:
• Created the project in Migrated data Application and added migration object source list.
  • In LTMOM we checked the FM that was not RFC enabled so we copied and created custom FM with RFC enabled.
  • In SLT we cloned the source structure, target structure, structure mapping ,field mapping of DMC TO SLT ( We referred DMC and doing same in SLT whatever there in DMC) .
  • In SLT while generating object getting Field is unknown but there is field with similar name.

entry.title: Introducing Joule: SAP’s AI Copilot for Seamless Business Interactions
entry.content:
Introducing Joule: SAP’s AI Copilot for Seamless Business Interactions

 

SAP is transforming the way businesses interact with their systems with Joule, its AI-powered copilot designed to enhance productivity and simplify tasks. Joule serves as a centralized AI assistant across the SAP ecosystem, providing a seamless and context-aware user experience. 

What Makes Joule Unique?

One AI Copilot for SAP: Joule integrates across SAP cloud solutions like SAP SuccessFactors and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, allowing users to interact naturally through language.

Out-of-the-Box & Native Integration: With pre-configured content, Joule is ready to use with minimal setup, making it instantly valuable.

Consistent User Experience: Whether accessed via SAP Start, mobile, or application UIs, Joule ensures a smooth and familiar interaction.

Reliable & Context-Aware: Joule understands user roles, permissions, and the SAP products they use, ensuring relevant responses. 

Responsible & Secure: With strict data protection policies, Joule does not use customer data for AI training or third-party purposes.

 

How Does Joule Help?

  • Provides context-aware responses based on business transactions and data.
  • Maintains cross-application reasoning for efficient navigation across SAP solutions.
  • Leverages Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for document-grounded responses.
  • Ensures data security & compliance by inheriting user authentication rights.
  • Includes ethical AI guardrails to prevent bias, hate speech, and misuse.

By integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) with SAP’s rich business context, Joule enables employees to work 80% more efficiently. It empowers businesses with faster decision-making, streamlined workflows, and enhanced user interactions—truly revolutionizing the SAP experience.

Joule Interaction Patterns is the main starting point.

It branches into four types of interactions:

  • Transactional: Supports CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations.
  • Navigational: Helps users find relevant SAP screens.
  • Informational: Provides knowledge-based answers using SAP Help and Customer Content (Document Grounding).
  • Analytical: Enables data insights through SAP Analytics Cloud and JustAsk.

This flowchart visually simplifies the interaction patterns of Joule. 

Unlocking Business Knowledge with Joule’s Document Grounding

In today’s workplace, quick access to accurate information is crucial. Joule’s Document Grounding feature ensures employees get the right answers based on company-specific documents—without the need for complex AI training or manual searching.

  • What is Document Grounding?

Document Grounding allows businesses to upload important documents—like HR policies, travel guidelines, and FAQs—into Joule. When employees ask a question, Joule retrieves the most relevant information from these documents and delivers a clear, concise response with source citations.

 

  • Why Does This Matter?

Traditional AI models rely on general knowledge, which may not always reflect company-specific policies. Grounding enhances AI by:

✔️ Providing business-specific answers based on internal documentation.

✔️ Citing sources, increasing transparency and trust.

✔️ Reducing misinformation by pulling directly from company-approved materials.

✔️ Eliminating costly AI retraining, as Joule dynamically retrieves the latest content.

 

  • How It Transforms the Employee Experience?

For instance, in SAP SuccessFactors, employees can ask Joule questions about HR policies and receive instant, reliable answers. This saves time, reduces confusion, and enhances productivity—making company knowledge more accessible to everyone.

entry.title: EPPM專案關閉作業
entry.content: 專案〈含收入〉(Project with revenue)在做專案Closed之前，是否也要特別去維護[結算規則]，那這個維護動作的目的和效用為何？

entry.title: 專案報工問題
entry.content:
HI SAP

我們自己環境在使用[管理我的工時表]時，[建立工作細項]點開後有兩個可以選，一個是[其他會計物件]，一個是[未配置員工的專案]，[其他會計物件]是EPPM的專案，[未配置員工的專案]是PS的專案，所以在[未配置員工的專案]看起來是選不到EPPM的WBS元素的

但現在在客戶的S系統點選[[建立工作細項]後不會跑出兩個選項，會直接跳到[未配置員工的專案]，不知道我們是不是少開了什麼scope item？還是哪裡沒配好？

entry.title: 無法選到報工項目
entry.content:
HI SAP

我在EPPM模組的APP:管理專案需求中建立了人力資源的需求，但建立完成後無法在APP:管理我的工時表中去進行報工，我已經完成APP:管理成本比率-服務的設定，請問是哪邊出了問題?

entry.title: Re: Convert DMS Folder ID to Name in Automation
entry.content:
The above only works if the folder is in the root directory, which is OK for the common scenario of getting the folder ID after a user uploads a file to a trigger form and the process passes the folder ID to an automation.

To get the path for any folder in the DMS repo, you can simply amend the script task so the URL includes the cmis:path query parameter:

&filter=cmis:path,cmis:name

This will return the path of the folder. You can only get this property for a folder.

This property is not returned when you do not filter the request at all.

entry.title: Create Checkbox field in Opportunity overview page in sap c4c
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there any way to create custom field with checkbox with the help of standard functionality OR ELSE can we create it with the help of SDK? If it is possible through SDK, what should be the steps to create it?

I want to create a checkbox field in C4C Opportunity overview page. Please guide me on this.

Thank you!!!

 

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

+91 9898712915

entry.title: Re: How to reverse-engineer a JSON file into a PDM in PD Web
entry.content:
Hello George,

From either the NoSQL model or its diagram, click the Tools (Hamburger) menu then you should get the "Reverse JSON Schema File" and "Reverse JSON Data File" available.
Please refer to attached screenshot.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting connection problems: HANA express from HANA Studio
entry.content:
Hello,
I couldn't make the connection configuration between eclipse and HANA DB.
what can avoid the connection ?
SAP HANA Express edition, HANA DB is running on VM
Eclipse is on a local computer

Ping is successful. 
Eclipse can't connect. I enabled the port on Firewall and still no success.

entry.title: Company Structure Configuration
entry.content:
Hi,

could you please advise why in the "Company Structure Overview" the positions are displayed twice, once under position of Supervisor and once under Department?

Thank you and regards,

Aneta

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Re: Interview scheduling with different domains
entry.content:
I think that the key is if multiple MS versions are used in your company but not the Domain(it is the result). For example, some companies have multiple MS versions, one is used globally(O365), but maybe in China, a standalone version is used(old version targeted to China).

However, SF Recruiting only supports integration with one server(Azure cloud version).

entry.title: Re: Introducing Joule: SAP’s AI Copilot for Seamless Business Interactions
entry.content: Good job👍

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay - Custom gates with cross section impact
entry.content:
Hi

While I appreciate the technical details and the nice example of ways to use Assignment Level Custom Fields, I don't see how this cannot be accomplished with the standard Gates and Accelerators functionality as detailed here:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/gates-and-accelerators-in-variable-pay

There is a specific combination that says "If business goal X doesn't reach target Y, then the individual section pays out at 0".

Can you please explain the advantage of using the custom method over the standard?

entry.title: Re: Invoice creation(automatic) after PGI done
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the same problem, did you manage to solve it?

 BAPI "BAPI_BILLINGDOC_CREATEMULTIPLE" does not call the implementation.

entry.title: How to pass multiple values to function import in odata service
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I want to create a RAP BO with a behaviors. The behavior will have a function to perform a complex query. As we know, function is translated to the function import of OData service. But I don't understand how to pass multiple values to the function import while I test the OData service. E.g. I want to pass an array of material numbers to my function import parameter.

Can you please suggest how to do that?

Adding few ABAP experts for visibility @CarineTchoutouo @Andre_Fischer @Ramjee_korada 

Thanks,

Mainak

NW ABAP Gateway (OData) SAP Gateway ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: Re: Setting Status of Networks BAPI_BUS2002_SET_STATUS
entry.content:
Have you tried manually changing the status to see if the same error occurs? Is it a system status or a user status?

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.content:
It's not clear how to make new check numbers.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to maintain Check Number in app, Auditor Direct A...
entry.content: Please enter the Check Number required and then select the 'Audit' button above to create a new Check Number.

entry.title: Sales Order OData V4 doesn't return the characteristics with date type correctly
entry.content:
Hello

We're using Sales Order OData V4 API to get the characteristics in item level, and for all characteristics with CharcDataType = DATE, the value of the date is not showing in the GET call result.

For example, I have a characteristic populated with 01/30/2025 in SO 73 item 10, and when calling the OData:

{hostname}/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_salesorder/srvd_a2x/sap/salesorder/0001/SalesOrderItem(SalesOrder='73',SalesOrderItem='10')?$expand=_VariantConfiguration($expand=_Instance($expand=_Characteristic($expand=_AssignedValue($select=Characteristic,VarCnfCharacteristicValue,VarCnfCharcValueDescription))))

This is the characteristic piece of the result

{
                        "VarConfigurationBusObjectKey": "0000000073000010",
                        "VarConfigurationBusObjectType": "SalesOrderItem",
                        "VarConfignInstceInternalID": 1,
                        "Characteristic": "Z_HGM0400_040",
                        "CharcDataType": "DATE",
                        "CharcTemplate": "MM/DD/YYYY",
                        "Currency": null,
                        "CharcValueUnit": null,
                        "VarCnfCharcISOUnit": null,
                        "IsReadOnly": false,
                        "EntryIsRequired": false,
                        "CharcIsHidden": false,
                        "AdditionalValueIsAllowed": true,
                        "MultipleValuesAreAllowed": false,
                        "_AssignedValue": [
                            {
                                "VarConfigurationBusObjectKey": "0000000073000010",
                                "VarConfigurationBusObjectType": "SalesOrderItem",
                                "VarConfignInstceInternalID": 1,
                                "Characteristic": "Z_HGM0400_040",
                                "VariantConfigurationValueID": "1-",
                                "VarCnfCharacteristicValue": null,
                                "VarCnfCharcValueDescription": null
                            }
                        ]
                    }
Is this a standard behavior, if yes where I can see the 01/30/2025 value of the characteristic ?

Thanks & Regards,

Ahmed.

entry.title: is person responsible field is required for WBS synchronization
entry.content: is person responsible field is  required for WBS synchronization for transferring WBS  from SAP to Eproc ??

entry.title: Re: Future Manager (Internal Hire) created automatically in Job relationship during Rehire check in
Re: Cloud Integration - How to configure Session Handling in Integration Flow
entry.content:
Hello.

 

What do you mean "only works for stateless services."?

You can expect the highest performance improvement using this option but this option only works for stateless services.

Regards

entry.title: ‘US’, when ‘ZUORA’ is sending 10 digit postal code, our system is receiving only 9 digits
entry.content: We debugged and analyzed the Idoc number-940033330 found that when ‘ZUORA’ is sending the data from their system to our system via ONEPO in our system postal code holding limit is only 9 digit in structure. Please find the below screenshot. So for company code ‘US’, when ‘ZUORA’ is sending 10 digit postal code, our system is receiving only 9 digits and 10th one digit is getting truncated just because of 9 digit holding capacity in SAP structure.

entry.title: Re: New Installation of SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS2 – Part 1 – Maintenance Planner
entry.content: I'm missing part 3 (BP activation) for release 2023 FPS 2. Is it available at all?

entry.title: How to get all available information of the current user using the BTP iOS SDK?
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I'm new to the SDK and I cannot find any information on how to read all available properties of the current user of the app. I do not use Fiori but this seems not to be the problem.

It would the awesome to get information like the department in which the user works, etc.

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: IAS activation email resend after expired
entry.content:
Hi

You can check if mails were verified using "Export Users" functionality and check based on the attribute:

urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User:mailVerified

FALSE means that the user hasn't verified the account. I'm not sure if you have a simply way via the UI to mass send activations emails. By the way i'm not sure what's the specific scenario but I'd try to use a custom IDP to redirect the users for authentication instead of IAS.

entry.title: navigate to the component/version object page of the same entity
entry.content:
Hi all,

i have an entity books

books: cuid{

title:string

bookid:string

isdeleted: boolean

versions: Association to many books on  versions.bookid = $self.bookid and versions.isDeleted = true and versions.isDeleted != $self.isDeleted ;

}

this gives a table of versions in the object page 

adding the below in manifest enables the navigation

in routes

"name": "versionDetail",
"pattern": "books({key})/versions({key2}):?query:",
"target": "versionDetail"
 
 
in targets of object page 
"navigation": {
"versions": {
"detail": {
"route": "versionDetail"
}
}
say the current version key is k1 and one of the previous version key is k2
 
the click on the table the url goes to books(k1)/versions(k2)
but i want the navigation to happen to books(k2)
the table comes from cap annotations not in the frontend

entry.title: Re: Why does Hybris startup hang when near SessionFixatio...
entry.content: I think that is the solution... thanks!

entry.title: Re: Future Manager (Internal Hire) created automatically...
entry.content:
Hi @pvaibhav I encountered the same issue, i found this is actually needed for rehires and the system will add automatically...The only config needed is to ensure this type of relationship role is added to the picklist..You don't really need to be using this on existing roles. So if you have that value in the jobRelType picklist, then this will be added automatically. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_ONBOARDING/c94ed5fcb5fe4e0281f396556743812c/fc9d07696e9144d9a2234335e4355d49.html?q=grant%20this%20role%20to&locale=en-US

I also found the job relationship is not removed automatically after start date, it looks like it needs to be removed manually I'm afraid

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_ONBOARDING/c94ed5fcb5fe4e0281f396556743812c/c177f53ede5146f3968e20fb8252da3a.html?q=grant%20this%20role%20to&locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: SAC Add-in for Powerpoint
entry.content:
Hello

I just logged an improvement in SAP customer influencer portal to remove the limitation on Table widget.

In case somebody interested pls vote the idea at this link Idea 340318.

Thanks 

Regards

Hello Experts, 

Our client has asked that each employee should "Acknowledge" the compensation statement that receives. 

Have someone else had to configure this requirement? 

Thank you in advance

entry.content: Did you find the solution? And do you know how to access the model defined in manifest from js handler extension?

entry.title: Re: IDOC Error Segment Detail ALV Tool Deployment Instructions
entry.content:
Hi RR0001,

on 10th of April 2024 Mrs. Sravya Stalanki answered my PN that she does not have the code any longer.

Regards
Holger

entry.title: Handling SKA1 Warnings in Custom Code Post S/4 Migration
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community Members,

I am seeking advice on an issue encountered after migrating our systems to SAP S/4HANA and analyzing the code with the ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC). After the migration, numerous warnings have appeared regarding the use of SKA1 in the custom code developed for our client, which was adopted from an ECC machine. I have reviewed the SAP notes 2431747 and 2389136 related to these warnings. While I understand the impact of now having secondary cost elements within SKA1, I am unsure how to resolve these warnings.

A new field, GLACCOUNT_TYPE, has been added, which I believe should be neccesary to exclude the secondary cost elements that now appears in SKA1. Despite modifying the code, the same warnings persist when re-running the ATC.

An example of basic consult with errors in ATC:

  SELECT ska1~ktopl, ska1~saknr, ska1~vbund
    FROM ska1
    INTO TABLE lt_ska1
  WHERE  ska1~ktopl IN lr_ktopl AND
         ska1~saknr IN lr_saknr AND
         ska1~vbund   NE space
    ORDER BY PRIMARY KEY.

Has anyone experienced this issue and found a way to resolve it without resorting to pseudocomments? Any insights or advice would be greatly appreciated. At this moment, the use of CDS entities is not contemplated at this stage of the project.

Thank you very much in advance for your time and assistance.

Kind regards,

Ruxixon.

entry.title: Re: Kyma APIRule v2alpha1: MaxAge default causing an error in Terraform
entry.content: I think this has something to do with a message I'm seeing in the Kyma UI: "Disabling custom CORS Policy is not recommended. Consider setting up CORS yourself". So it looks ilke we might be an edge case in that regard. I'll just go the standard route and set up CORS policy in this case I think, prior to converting.

entry.title: IPS Transformation - Condition not working
entry.content:
Hello guys,

We are mapping attributes with IPS transformations (Source Entra ID / Target IAS) and I am having an issue when setting a condition that is not working. (line 18)

 

            {
                "sourcePath": "$.givenName",
                "targetPath": "$.userName",
                "functions": [
                    {
                        "function": "substring",
                        "beginIndex": 0,
                        "endIndex": 5
                    },
                    {
                        "function": "concatString",
                        "suffix": "$.surname"
                    },
                    {
                        "function": "toUpperCaseString"
                    },
                    {
                        "condition": "($.userName.length() > 12)",
                        "function": "substring",
                        "beginIndex": 0,
                        "endIndex": 12
                    }
                ],
                "correlationAttribute": true
            },

 

Whitout the condition "condition": "($.userName.length() > 12)" it is working fine but when there is a login name which is less than 12 characters I get an error during the provisioning job.

So I would need the last part (lines 17 to 22) to run only when a login name is longer than 12 characeters but their must be a syntax problem on my condition.

Any ideas?

Cheers

N

entry.title: Re: Flush method is sap mdg fpm
entry.content: Hi Schmidt, I have one more doubt as below...when we create the CR, observed that even the standard class/method CL_BS_BP_GUIBB_ADDRESSES=>IF_FPM_GUIBB_LIST~GET_DATA been multiple times, i can even restrict based on the event id...am i right? using some enhancement technique...Kindly correct me the same. Thanks.

entry.content: Did you use SE24 or SE80 or ADT or something else?

Thanks and regards

Saranya

entry.title: Re: IW41 Confirmation - The reason field can't be set Man...
entry.content:
Greetings,

that is because there is more than one AFRUD-GRUND in customizing. Try to find the suitable one - I was able to achieve the desired result by selecting all three which might be too much.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: Combining Multiple Wildcard Searches in Same Report
entry.content: Thank you again for reaching out. I will try and find a work-around but I do appreciate your help! Take care!

entry.title: Re: Introducing Joule: SAP’s AI Copilot for Seamless Busi...
entry.content: Detail information about SAP AI, Nice work 🙂

entry.title: Re: Useful ways to use ‘Variables’ and ‘Cardinality’ rule functions in Onboarding and Employee centr
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Thank you for sharing your findings.

I've tried the onInit rule with a cardinality, for the Pay Components, to avoid it to be triggered every time someone goes in the step "Review new Hire Data" during an Onboarding, but it doesn't work, the rule trace says : "Could not perform set for 'HireActionBean.payComponentRecurring(#<condition here>#)[0].pay_component' because the context object is null"

 

Is there something I'm missing?

entry.title: Re: Frequent Login Prompt for DM Refresh
entry.content:
Hello Eyal,

 

That is normal product behavior.

The only way to avoid this is to implement some form of SSO (either AD or SAML authentication)

 

Best regards,

Marc Kuipers

entry.title: Create Customer Project via app 'Plan Customer Project'
entry.content:
While creating Customer Project via app 'Plan Customer Project' i am getting a standard waning message 'We recommend a maximum duration of three years'. I would like to know:

1. If this is just warning and i could carry on with Project duration more than 3 years? 

2. Or not select project duration more than 3 years? and why so? what all other functionalities will be impacted in S4 HANA Professional Service Public cloud?  

Regards

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Handling SKA1 Warnings in Custom Code Post S/4 Migration
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community Members,

I am seeking advice on an issue encountered after migrating our systems to SAP S/4HANA and analyzing the code with the ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC). After the migration, numerous warnings have appeared regarding the use of SKA1 in the custom code developed for our client, which was adopted from an ECC machine. I have reviewed the SAP notes 2431747 and 2389136 related to these warnings. While I understand the impact of now having secondary cost elements within SKA1, I am unsure how to resolve these warnings.

A new field, GLACCOUNT_TYPE, has been added, which I believe should be neccesary to exclude the secondary cost elements that now appears in SKA1. Despite modifying the code, the same warnings persist when re-running the ATC.

An example of basic consult with errors in ATC:

  SELECT ska1~ktopl, ska1~saknr, ska1~vbund FROM ska1

    INTO TABLE lt_ska1

  WHERE  ska1~ktopl IN lr_ktopl AND

         ska1~saknr IN lr_saknr AND

         ska1~vbund   NE space

    ORDER BY PRIMARY KEY.

Has anyone experienced this issue and found a way to resolve it without resorting to pseudocomments? Any insights or advice would be greatly appreciated. At this moment, the use of CDS entities is not contemplated at this stage of the project.

Thank you very much in advance for your time and assistance.

Kind regards,

Ruxixon.

entry.title: Re: Handling SKA1 Warnings in Custom Code Post S/4 Migration
entry.content:
To get same result than in ECC, exclude secondary cost account (SKA1-GLACCOUNT_TYPE ≠ 'S')

  • check my old answer

entry.title: Re: Standard BAPI BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE copy
entry.content: Never ever copy standard code, as explained in the SAP note 213751 - Programs: Copying versus modification - SAP for Me.

entry.title: Re: My app can not export PDF anymore after Windows 11 up...
entry.content: I found this catalog in SAP CR 2026. SAP BusinessObjects\Crystal Reports\crystalreportviewers\ActiveXControls

entry.title: Re: My app can not export PDF anymore after Windows 11 up...
entry.content: I found this catalog in SAP CR 2026. "SAP BusinessObjects\Crystal Reports\crystalreportviewers\ActiveXControls". Is this what I need?

entry.title: DI API update report layout menu item name
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to update the name of menu item of report ?

I update the the name of report with
ReportLayoutsService.UpdatePrinterSettings
but it does not rename the menu item.

 

All I've found :

delete report layout and menu using
ReportLayoutsService.DeleteReportLayoutAndMenu
and recreate it again with
ReportLayoutsService.AddReportLayoutToMenu
But with this method i will loose additional settings (authorizations, ..)

entry.title: Re: Learning material for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Editio...
entry.content:
Hi @MaiDao1,
It looks like these are not learning journeys you are looking for rather these are units  or lessons within learning journeys.

  • Implementing with a Cloud Mindset, Building the Team, and Conducting Fit-to-Standard Workshops
    This is a lesson in our Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition learning journey 
    You can find it here link to lesson 
  • Data Migration and Business Process Testing
    These are lessons in our Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition learning journey
    • Migrating Data to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 
    • Testing Configured Business Processes 
  • Extensibility and Integration
    It is not clear to me to which SAP Solution you are referring to 
    here is a list of topic related learning journeys
  • Configuration and the SAP Fiori Launchpad
    This is a lesson with the Learning the Basics of SAP Fiori 
    Link to the lesson Configuring SAP Fiori Launchpad 
  • System Landscapes and Identity Access Management
    This is a lesson in our Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition learning journey 
    You can find it here link to lesson 
  • Introduction to Cloud Computing and SAP Cloud ERP Deployment Options
    Please check this  Exploring SAP Cloud ERP 

Kind regards
Margit

but when I make the call from sap build it gives me an error

Any comments, I feel a little frustrated because I haven't been able to move forward and I know it's something stupid that I'm missing

Please your help

entry.title: Re: Gts commodity code transfer to S4
entry.content:
Hello,

Did you activate the change pointers? I think they are /SAPSLL/PRCLS and /SAPSLL/CLSMD.

Regards, Dean.

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Migration from SAP BW 7.5 to SAP BW/4HAN...
entry.content:
Hello Eduard,

Thank you for your previous insights regarding the conversion process and grouping of BW objects.

I have an additional question related to the extraction setup during our phased migration. Our plan is to continue operating our current BW system alongside BW/4HANA during the migration. For instance, we intend to extract data from the 2LIS_03_BF_TR data source using two methods concurrently:

  • Legacy Extraction: To feed our existing BW system using the traditional SAP source system.
  • ODP Extraction: To load data into BW/4HANA via the ODP framework.

My questions are:

  1. Concurrent Extraction Support:
    Can we extract data from the same ECC data source (2LIS_03_BF_TR) simultaneously using both the legacy extraction method and the ODP framework without conflicts?

  2. Configuration Considerations:
    Are there specific configuration steps or best practices to ensure that enabling ODP on this data source does not interfere with the delta handling or data consistency for the legacy extraction process?

  3. Monitoring and Delta Handling:
    What recommendations do you have for monitoring the delta queues or initial load processes to ensure that both extraction paths (legacy and ODP) operate smoothly side by side?

Your guidance on setting up and validating this dual extraction scenario would be greatly appreciated as we work through the module-by-module migration.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Amir

entry.title: SAP TRM: Accelerate Pay-Outs of Refund Requests with Machine Learning and DoX
entry.content:
At tax authorities, the process of reviewing and approving refund requests is oftentimes a time-consuming manual process that causes a high workload for tax officers due to the volume of submitted requests.

In the EU for instance, businesses that are VAT-registered in one EU member state can apply for a refund of the VAT paid on expenses directly related to business activities, such as travel, accommodation, trade fair participation, or supplier services.

  • EU businesses must file a VAT refund claim via their home country's tax authority's online portal 
  • The home tax authority forwards the claim to the relevant tax authority in the country where the VAT was incurred.
  • The tax authority in the refunding country has four months to process the claim. The refunds are usually issued via bank transfer.

From a practical perspective, each refund request is composed of, at minima:

  • Copies of invoices or import documents
  • Explanation of the nature of goods or services purchased

When processing these refund requests, tax authorities face several challenges: 

  • Time-consuming manual review of invoices and refund requests
  • High workload for tax officers due to the volume of refund requests
  • Errors in data entry and validation during manual processing
  • Delays in refund to taxpayers

Combining the features of the SAP Intelligent Solution Lifecycle Management (ISLM) framework and the SAP BTP Document Information Service (SAP DoX), we have built a prototype that 

  • Automates data extraction and validation, reducing manual intervention
  • Identifies exceptions for targeted manual review, streamlining operations
  • Speeds up refund processing while improving accuracy and compliance

The refund process is a standard process supported by SAP Tax and Revenue Management since its inception. We have enhanced this process to submit all invoice documents in a refund request to DoX, and to extract required data fields for comparison and validation, providing a level of confidence of the submitted invoices with the requested refund amounts.

Below is an example of a refund request with two invoices, all details have been captured by the taxpayer when submitting the refund request, each record has a scanned invoice document attached to the request.

Initially the level of confidence is set to 0% (no matching has been made so far)

 We then trigger the matching process manually. In real life, this process would be executed in a mass activity.

 The invoices are then submitted to and processed by SAP DoX.

Relevant fields are extracted and shared with the business rules engine to compare with the submitted information in the refund request.

 Each record in the refund request is finally enhanced with a level of confidence, allowing the tax officers to focus on records with a lower confidence level.

How did we do it, from a technical perspective? Here are the steps we took to facilitate matching of uploaded documents in TRM using SAP BTP DoX service:

  • Developed a class which enables communication between OnPrem/PCE system and BTP DOX. Main responsibilities of that Class:
    • Authentication (using OAuth 2.0) for instantiated HTTP Client
    • HTTP-specific operations such as:
      • setting payload
      • sending request
      • retrieving response
    • DoX-specific operations such as:
      • Submitting documents for extraction (asynchronous)
      • Checking extraction job status
      • Retrieving extraction result
  • Developed a code specific to the Tax Refund process

We have opted for a code that is triggered directly from BRF+ upon certain conditions (in our case it was a bespoke BRF+ Activity)

Code is then responsible for:

  • Retrieval of uploaded documents (invoices/receipts) from DMS
  • Sending documents to DOX (using above mentioned class) for extraction
  • Perform a business process-specific matching to calculate the confidence score

The Intelligent Refund Request Processing is brought to you by the SAP TRM Initiative, embedding AI and BTP services to elevate the SAP TRM solution.

Are you an SAP TRM Customer? Do you want to know more about Intelligent Refund Request Processing and other innovative solutions for SAP TRM? Reach out to your SAP Account Executive and request an SAP Business AI Discovery Workshop for SAP TRM, it's free of charge.

entry.title: Re: Sap Customer Checkout Article sync error "Error while...
entry.content: If you have some experience in Integration Framework maybe you can investigate the message logs, the ipo-steps, the queues; if not, is better to report the incident in SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Dump for the second time when using FM PM_ORDER_DATA_READ
entry.content:
Use this code to refresh every loop, before calling your main FM

    CALL FUNCTION 'CO_ZF_DATA_RESET_COMPLETE'
      EXCEPTIONS
        OTHERS = 0.
    CALL FUNCTION 'CO_BH_DATA_RESET'.

entry.title: Re: Simplify SSO with Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) & SAP Identity Authentication Service
entry.content:
Hello, thanks for the blog entry. It has helped me to quickly establish the connection between EntraID and IAS. But then I had problems using the CorporateIdentityProvider for our IAG because the surname, first name etc were not correct.
The whole thing can be solved quite easily under ‘Enriched Assertion Attributes’ by making the following entries there:
last_name    ${http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/05/identity/claims/surname}
first_name    ${http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/05/identity/claims/givenname}

entry.title: why unassigned GL accounts are showing in Financial statements report under transaction code-F.01
entry.content: I have created new FSVs to split two different statement like balance sheet statement & P & L statement seperately, when i execute F.01 transaction, its showing revenue gl accounts and expenses accounts in Balance sheet statement? I make sure that i never assigned these GL accounts in my FSV (balance sheet statement). From where these gl are coming in F.01 screen? i am confusing where is the issue? what is the reason to show these gl in balance sheet account.

entry.title: Re: CREATE_DEEP_ENTITY using RAP ( Unmanaged )
entry.content: @Mahmoud_Wael thanks for sharing details very helpful…

entry.title: Re: Standard BAPI BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE copy
entry.content: The 11th crime of Top 10 ABAP crimes 😎

entry.title: Material requirements are transferred despite delivery block or credit block
entry.content:
It is not possible to block a sales order and prevent the corresponding transfer of requirements. 

The material requirement must not be transferred to the sales requirements list.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Material requirements are transferred despite deliver...
entry.content:
It is standard system design that the delivery or the credit block does not prevent the transfer of requirements.

As a workaround, set the "Fixed Date & Quantity" indicator to prevent the transfer. When the user has set the correct delivery block on the header level the system will reset the confirmed quantity when saving the sales document. If the "Fixed Date & Quantity" indicator is set additionally, system will not transfer anything to the Sales Material Requirements.

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors LMS - Microsoft Teams VLS Integration
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

Any one face this issue "VLS Error Code: Exception from Teams : Forbidden : No application access policy found for this app"

entry.title: Get documents from TOAHR for specific PERNR
entry.content:
Hi,
We got the task at hand to export every document for a specific personnel number (pernr) from the TOAHR.
The export works fine.
The issue at the moment is to link the personnel number (pernr) to the specific document.
With SAP_OBJECT = PREL it's quite easy since the first eight numbers of the OBJECT_ID are the personnel number (pernr).
But for other SAP_OBJECT values like TAXCERPYDE or else, it doesnt seem like there is a personnel number (pernr) in the OBJECT_ID.

Since I couldn't find any mapping table that will link the pernr to the document id, is there a way to link documents to a personnel number?

entry.title: How Disable Purchase requisition creation when a material is on a BOM but not planned by MRP.
entry.content: Disable Purchase requisition creation when a material is on a BOM but not planned by MRP. They are triggered from production orders.

entry.title: Re: I created the SAP GUI AI Agent
entry.content:
Interesting. - Did I get this correctly: You didn't use recorded scripts in order to retrain the LLM model? Would it be possible the retrain the model with the help of recorded scripts in order to succeed in more specific situations, e.g if one wants to perform a series of postings automatically or in order to perform automated tests?

Thanks and regards,

Thomas

entry.title: Re: CRM Utilities - Authorization restriction in contract...
entry.content: Hi Carsten

entry.title: Re: Third Party Gift Cards (Givex) in SAP Customer Checkout
entry.content: Max, you can achieve that through a plugin development. SCCO implements its own gift card solution.

entry.title: Re: Equipment- Partner Function Update
entry.content: Thank very much Vaibhav
